query:
-- 4. Apollo named_unverified — why aren't they send_ready?
SELECT 
  CASE WHEN email IS NOT NULL AND email != '' THEN 'has_email' ELSE 'no_email' END as emailStatus,
  verificationStatus,
  emailVerified,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM contacts
WHERE enrichmentSource = 'apollo' AND contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified'
GROUP BY emailStatus, verificationStatus, emailVerified
ORDER BY count DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
-- 4. Apollo named_unverified — why aren't they send_ready?
SELECT 
  CASE WHEN email IS NOT NULL AND email != '' THEN 'has_email' ELSE 'no_email' END as emailStatus,
  verificationStatus,
  emailVerified,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM contacts
WHERE enrichmentSource = 'apollo' AND contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified'
GROUP BY emailStatus, verificationStatus, emailVerified
ORDER BY count DESC;
